calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-06-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Amanda Bey; Clerk: V. Mack; Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Donald Eesley is present.
Attorney, Michael Rossoff, Esq., representing the plaintiff is also present.

Defendants Sherry Ludwig (sued as Ludwick) and Keith Shick are present.
Attorney, Sonja M. Sonnenburg, Esq., representing the defendants through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement (Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or for Dismissal of Action With Prejudice), which was NOT FILED.

This case did settle. The trial date of AUG-10-2009 is vacated.
